title: In War’s First Week, a Punishing Military Campaign With No Coherent Endgame
summary_full: The U.S. and Israel have pounded Iran’s leadership and undercut its defense capabilities, but President Trump has offered wildly different explanations for what he hopes to achieve.
summary_public: The U.S. and Israel have pounded Iran’s leadership and undercut its defense capabilities, but President Trump has offered wildly different explanations for what he hopes to achieve.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: The U.S. and Israel have pounded Iran’s leadership
